title: BEVFormer: 3D Object Detection from Surround Cameras
summary: An in-depth look at BEVFormer, a cutting-edge spatio-temporal transformer framework that projects multi-camera inputs into a unified Bird's Eye View (BEV) representation for 3D object detection.

title: Solving Linear & Non-Linear Equations using SVD
summary: A mathematical dissection of Singular Value Decomposition (SVD). Learn how it solves linear regression via Moore-Penrose pseudoinverses and 3D LiDAR point cloud alignments (ICP) by selectively retaining or discarding scaling.
